title: Macaglia melanocalyx
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant Macaglia melanocalyx. 

However, I did find that the plant "Macaglia" seems to be misspelled, possibly referring to "Macgillivray" which is an alternative name for the plant "Macgillivray's box (Macleaya cordata)" or it could be referring to the plant "Macleaya macrostachya", another possible alternative name for "Macleaya cordata" and Macleaya cordata and Macleaya macrostachya are not the same plant.
taxonomy: Macaglia melanocalyx is classified as a species within the plant family Eriocaulaceae. It is native to South America. The genus Macaglia is part of the larger plant order Poales. Further classification of Macaglia melanocalyx places it within the family Eriocaulaceae, tribe Eriocaulaceae, and subfamily Eriocauloideae.
constituents: I couldn't find information on the plant Macaglia melanocalyx.
